scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.lint: node --check packages/core/src/tenantScope.js packages/auth/src/roles/roles.js packages/auth/src/permissions/permissions.js packages/auth/src/guards/require-auth.js packages/auth/src/guards/api-guard.js packages/auth/src/session/session-store.js packages/auth/src/session/session-context.js packages/auth/src/password/password-reset.js packages/auth/src/password/password-hasher.js packages/auth/src/users/user-store.js packages/auth/src/csrf/csrf.js packages/auth/src/rate-limit/login-throttle.js packages/domain/src/school-structure/models.js packages/domain/src/school-structure/validation.js packages/domain/src/school-structure/repository.js packages/domain/src/school-structure/service.js apps/web/src/modules/core-school.js apps/web/src/modules/student.js apps/web/src/modules/parent.js apps/web/src/modules/attendance.js apps/web/src/modules/attendance-events.js apps/web/src/modules/absence-notices.js apps/web/src/modules/discipline.js apps/web/src/modules/lesson-homework.js apps/web/src/modules/grading.js apps/web/src/modules/messaging.js apps/web/src/modules/finance.js apps/web/src/modules/bulletin.js apps/web/src/modules/tenants.js apps/web/src/modules/persistence/postgres-user-repository.js apps/web/src/modules/persistence/postgres-tenant-repository.js apps/web/src/modules/persistence/postgres-core-school-repository.js apps/web/src/modules/persistence/postgres-absence-notices-repository.js apps/web/src/modules/persistence/postgres-discipline-repository.js apps/web/src/modules/persistence/postgres-alert-thresholds-repository.js apps/web/src/modules/persistence/postgres-dropout-risk-repository.js apps/web/src/modules/attendance-stats.js apps/web/src/modules/dropout-risk.js apps/web/src/modules/email.js apps/web/src/services/absence-service.js apps/web/src/routes/multipart.js apps/web/src/server.js packages/core/src/runtime-env.js apps/web/src/e2e.smoke.test.js
scripts.test: node --test packages/core/src/tenantScope.test.js packages/auth/src/session/session-store.test.js packages/auth/src/guards/require-auth.test.js packages/auth/src/guards/api-guard.test.js packages/auth/src/permissions/permissions.test.js packages/auth/src/csrf/csrf.test.js packages/auth/src/rate-limit/login-throttle.test.js packages/auth/src/users/user-store.test.js packages/domain/src/school-structure/service.test.js apps/web/src/server.test.js apps/web/src/modules/bulletin.test.js apps/web/src/modules/attendance-events.test.js apps/web/src/modules/absence-notices.test.js apps/web/src/modules/discipline.test.js apps/web/src/modules/attendance-stats.test.js apps/web/src/modules/dropout-risk.test.js apps/web/src/routes/multipart.test.js packages/core/src/runtime-env.test.js apps/web/src/modules/email.test.js apps/web/src/modules/class-feed.test.js apps/web/src/templates/email-new-post.test.js
scripts.start:railway: cross-env NODE_ENV=production EDUCLINK_PERSISTENCE=postgres LOG_FORMAT=json LOG_LEVEL=info node scripts/start-with-migrate.js
scripts.start:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production EDUCLINK_PERSISTENCE=postgres LOG_FORMAT=json node apps/web/src/server.js
scripts.railway:setup:seed: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
